notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG fixed-origin normalized-price rank basket from approved card FERNHOLZ-KOCH-RANK-2016_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1; at the first tradable bar of every broker month, normalize each latest completed close to its own close at the locked common 2017-01-03 origin, require a common anchor and endpoint plus at least 20 post-anchor bars, buy the lower normalized-price leg, short the higher leg, and evaluate the package rather than standalone legs. The source uses 30 daily-rebalanced collateralized futures; the two-CFD narrowing, monthly cadence, fixed-origin dependence, continuous-CFD basis, financing, gaps, and legging are binding Q02 falsification risks.
